mapper.sql: p.id, p.title, p.content, p.content_text, p.author_id, p.category_id, p.is_pinned, p.is_featured, p.view_count, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.collect_count, p.status, p.pinned_at, p.pinned_until, p.featured_at, p.featured_until, p.create_time, p.update_time, p.deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM posts p WHERE p.deleted = 0 AND p.status = 1 ORDER BY p.view_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
